meta_desc: Organise an outdoor cinema for your community: giant screen, all-in-one package or hire. A guaranteed summer hit, easy to set up, free quote.
hero_title: Outdoor cinema: the highlight of your community's summer
hero_desc: An outdoor movie night brings local residents together like few other events can. Hallucine equips councils and local authorities—giant screens, turnkey equipment or hire—for a successful evening, without the hassle of complicated logistics.
tout_desc: Buy for regular use, or hire for a one-off event.
c1_desc: Screen, projector and sound all in one: everything you need for a screening, ready to use, with no technical expertise required.
c2_desc: Just one screening over the summer? Hire the equipment for the duration of the event, without tying up your budget.
c3_desc: From the village square to the stadium: from 3 to 24 metres, set up in minutes, without the need for lifting equipment.
c4_desc: Sound systems, ballast, covers: everything you need for a large outdoor screen.
how_title: A summer programme in four stages
s1_desc: Depending on the space available, the expected audience and the council's budget.
s2_desc: A clear, detailed quote, tailored to local authority procedures, within 24 hours.
s3_desc: Quick inflation using a blower, without the need for a crane. Your technical staff can handle the installation.
s4_desc: The screening, then pack-down in a matter of minutes. Store it compactly until next time.
q1: How do I organise an open-air cinema in my community?
a1: Three key elements: the equipment (screen, projector, sound system – which we provide), the film's screening licence (via a distributor or specialist licensing company), and permission to use the public space (your council's own authorisation). As for the equipment, we provide a fully turnkey package.
q2: Will a crane or heavy machinery be required?
a2: No. Our inflatable screens are set up with a blower in a matter of minutes, without the need for lifting equipment. Your technical staff can handle the installation themselves.
q3: Should a local council buy or hire?
a3: If you plan to hold several screenings a year, buying the equipment pays for itself quickly. For a one-off event, hiring is the better option. We'll advise you based on your programme.
q4: Do you provide quotes that comply with public procurement regulations?
a4: Yes: our quotes are detailed and tailored to local authority procedures. Send us your specifications and we'll work to them.
cta_title: Plan your next outdoor movie night
cta_desc: Village square, park, stadium: tell us about your project and we'll provide a free quote.
